title: epithelantha pachyrhiza subsp. elongata
intro: Epithelantha pachyrhiza subsp. elongata is a rare and endangered species of cactus native to Mexico, belonging to the family Cactaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Epithelantha pachyrhiza subsp. elongata are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the stems or roots in hot water or by making a tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
